meta.description: A Confluence space — groups harvested Confluence Page objects and serves as a citable source for Domain Concepts

spaceUrl.description: Browser URL for this space in Confluence

pages.description: UUIDs of Confluence Page items belonging to this space

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_f289482c_f288_4694_9d70_f4b48979242d" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "name" TEXT,
    "space_key" TEXT,
    "cloud_id" TEXT,
    "space_url" TEXT,
    "pages" UUID[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_f289482c_f288_4694_9d70_f4b48979242d" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_f289482cf2884694_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
